body_html:
Hi Joel Dy,

I still do not have a clear read on whether you are trying to figure out the right next step, or if something changed on your side.

Sometimes at this stage people are still sorting out whether it makes more sense to jump on a quick call first, or come experience the food before deciding anything else.

If a quick call is easier, I can make time at 10:00 AM, 11:00 AM, or 1:00 PM.

Come Taste It First

If tasting makes more sense, I can save you a spot for one of the next available tastings.

Option 1: Sunday, May 3, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Option 2: Sunday, May 17, 2026 at 2:00 PM

Location: 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420

Code: ANDRE

Tasting Preview Tasting Registration

If you want, just reply with which direction feels better right now: quick call or tasting.

Regards,

Andre Raw
Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website
